title: transmissive blood test
steps: Collect blood with finger prick. 30 µL, 2 drops Room temperature MediPurpose SurgiLance (disposable blood lancet, MediPurpose, SLN300, minimum 30 uL blood draw, https://aossmedicalsupply.com/products/copy-of-safety-lancet-surgilance%C2%AE-fixed-depth-lancet-needle-2-8-mm-depth-21-gauge-pressure-activated )

Place blood in cuvette well, either directly or from a micro pipette. This image shows the same protocol being followed using human milk. demountable cuvette (NIR quartz, FireflySci, Type 19, 0.1 mm path length. NIR-transmissive, at least 1350 nm to 2150 nm., https://www.fireflysci.com/cuvette-holders-mounts/a20-series-cuvette-mounts-for-lightpaths-below-5mm?rq=cuvette%20mount )
Slide cuvette window over well. This image shows the same protocol being followed using human milk.

Place cuvette in mount. This image shows the same protocol being followed using human milk. A20 cuvette mount (cuvette mount, FireflySci, A20 Series, extended spring, https://www.fireflysci.com/cuvette-holders-mounts/a20-series-cuvette-mounts-for-lightpaths-below-5mm?rq=cuvette%20mount ) .

Place mount in sensor. This is the Preemie-branded sensor. The COVIDTell sensor will be the same spectrometer with different branding and housing. Preemie Sensor (handheld spectrometer, Preemie, Preemie Sensor, NIR transmissive spectrometer, 1350 nm to 2150 nm.)
Launch COVIDTell app on mobile device at start of day.
Perform scan by pressing button on sensor or tapping button in app.
Read results on app screen. Positive or Negative, or Failed. Mockup of COVID-19 smartphone app.
Clean cuvette with 50% alcohol. This might be done by a second person. go to step #2
Clear result in app before next subject arrives.
creator: mARK bLOORE
